ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Chiari academy in Catania. Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Chiari academy in Catania. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 231(BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.)Francesco Ferrara, Storia di Catania, Catania, 1829 (BL Shelfmark:General Reference Collection SFX lsidyv363f3ec8)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
